items: Iván Herrera homered 2 times, driving in 3 as St. Louis beat Minnesota, 9-6.
Jackson Chourio homered 2 times, driving in 4 in Philadelphia's 9-8 win over Milwaukee.
Max Muncy homered 2 times, driving in 4 as The Dodgers beat Chicago White Sox, 7-1.
The Angels pitching combined to shut out Tampa Bay, 8-0.
Pittsburgh walked off Miami, 3-2 — one of 2 one-run finishes across the league.
